prompt: A 2D pixel art sprite sheet of a single stone gargoyle statue in 8 different directions, arranged in a 3x3 grid. The style is detailed ancient weathered grey stone with glowing blue eyes. The directions are: Top-left: North-West, Top-middle: North (back view), Top-right: North-East, Middle-left: West (side view), Middle-center: empty, Middle-right: East (side view), Bottom-left: South-West, Bottom-middle: South (front view), Bottom-right: South-East. All statues are in a consistent sitting pose. Transparent background. Clear separation between images.
